text:
The goal bearing is -178°, which is almost directly behind the current heading (0°). This means I need to turn around to face the goal. A single TURN_LEFT or TURN_RIGHT only rotates 30°, so I will need multiple turns to align. Since -178° is effectively 180° behind, I should start turning. I'll choose TURN_LEFT to begin rotating toward the goal.
